title: Soviet Wolf Armor
description: Turns wolf armor into soviet style trench coat and ushanka. For the motherland Comrade Wolf.
body:
## A Thousand Times More Communist Glory Per Comrade Wolf Equipped.
Instead of boring old armadillo armor, equip your furry comrade in fine soviet wool, Ensuring that not only will little comrade be protected from capitalist-pig skeletons and Illagers, but that little comrade be stylish and GLORIOUS as well.

Download today comrade friend.
